title: senecio × kerneri
intro: Senecio × kerneri, also known as Kern's ragwort, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Senecio × kerneri include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote sweating, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Senecio × kerneri can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
